2022-23 Seattle Redhawks Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 20-12 (11-7, 4th in WAC MBB)

Coach: Chris Victor

PS/G: 72.0 (173rd of 363)

PA/G: 69.0 (145th of 363)

SRS: 0.91 (146th of 363)

SOS: 0.67 (131st of 363)

ORtg: 101.3 (249th of 363)

DRtg: 97.1 (65th of 363)
